name: HIR Lowering â€“ Expressions & Types
scope_summary: Remove stubs in `glyim-hir/src/lower.rs` for `lower_type_ref`, `lower_expr`, `lower_bin_op_token`, and `lower_pat`. Implement all missing type kinds (Array, Dyn, Slice, FnPtr) and expression kinds (Closure, Struct, Range, Index, Cast). Also implement number suffix parsing and unknown pattern handling.

tests.U01-T01: lower_type_ref parses Array, Dyn, Slice, FnPtr correctly (unit test)
tests.U01-T02: lower_expr handles Closure, Struct, Range, Index, Cast (unit test)
tests.U01-T03: Number suffix parsing works for i32, u64, f64, etc. (unit test)
tests.U01-T04: Unknown pattern kind falls back to error (unit test)

mocking: No mocking. Use `glyim_test::assert_ty` and `glyim_test::snapshot_cst` to verify HIR output.

name: MIR Lowering & Monomorphization
scope_summary: Remove stubs in `glyim-lower/src/lower.rs` (pattern destructuring, expr stmt dropped, unsupported literal, FnRef fallback, match guards, unhandled expr/place) and `glyim-pipeline/src/mono_cache.rs` (generic instantiation, drop glue generation, missing MIR body fallback). Also fix ADT field type resolution in `pipeline_context.rs`.

tests.U02-T01: Let binding with tuple pattern destructures correctly (unit test)
tests.U02-T02: Expr statement with side effects is not dropped (unit test)
tests.U02-T03: Unsupported literal falls back to error constant (unit test)
tests.U02-T04: Match guard expression is correctly lowered (unit test)
tests.U02-T05: Generic function instantiation works (run-pass via pipeline)
tests.U02-T06: Drop glue generated for struct with Box field (run-pass)

name: MIR Interpreter Stubs
scope_summary: Remove all stubs in `glyim-mir-interp/src/lib.rs`: implement `Discriminant` for aggregates, all `CastKind` variants, `Repeat` rvalue, support for `FloatBits`, `String`, `Fn`, `ConstRef` constants, and `Len` for nonâ€‘constant array lengths.

tests.U03-T01: Discriminant of enum returns correct tag (unit test)
tests.U03-T02: Cast IntToFloat produces float value (unit test)
tests.U03-T04: Repeat rvalue builds array constant (unit test)
tests.U03-T05: Len of array with const generic works (unit test)
tests.U03-T06: Fn constant used as operand is handled (unit test)

mocking: Use `glyim_test::phase::MirGenTester` to obtain MIR bodies, then run interpreter.

name: Bytecode Backend Stubs
scope_summary: Remove stubs in `glyim-codegen/src/lib.rs`: implement `Assign` with projections, `Rvalue::Ref`, `UnaryOp::Deref`, `TerminatorKind::Drop`, and support all `MirConstKind` variants (float, char, string). Implement `Repeat` rvalue correctly.

tests.U04-T01: Assign with field projection writes to correct offset (run-pass via bytecode interpreter)

mocking: Bytecode backend is selfâ€‘contained; test via `glyim_codegen::BytecodeBackend::generate_function`.

name: LLVM Backend â€“ Core Types & Aggregates
scope_summary: Remove stubs for type lowering: map all TyKinds to proper LLVM types (error â†’ i64, floats â†’ f32/f64, aggregates â†’ structs/arrays). Implement `lower_aggregate` for ADTs and closures, `lower_len`, `lower_repeat`, and fix unknown TyKind fallback.

tests.U05-T01: Struct type lowered to LLVM struct (run-pass via lli)
tests.U05-T02: Array literal lowered to LLVM constant array (run-pass)
tests.U05-T03: Len of array returns correct length (run-pass)
tests.U05-T04: Repeat rvalue builds array with repeated element (run-pass)
tests.U05-T05: Float type uses f32/f64, not i64 (run-pass)

mocking: Use real MIR from pipeline, compile to LLVM IR, run with `lli` to verify.

name: LLVM Backend â€“ Operators & Casts
scope_summary: Remove stubs for binary and unary ops on floats, `Not` on float, `Deref` on float, and `Cast` kinds (IntToFloat, FloatToInt, PtrToPtr). Implement all missing float arithmetic and comparisons.

name: LSP Server â€“ Core Features
scope_summary: Implement `SymbolIndex::build_from_hir` and `ReferenceGraph::build_from_hir` to populate symbol and reference databases. Also implement `provide_completions`, `goto_definition`, `hover`, `document_symbols`, `workspace_symbols` (already stubbed, need full logic).

tests.U07-T01: SymbolIndex built from HIR contains all definitions (unit test)
tests.U07-T02: Goto definition returns correct location (LSP test)
tests.U07-T04: Completions include local variables and functions (LSP test)
tests.U07-T05: Workspace symbol search fuzzy matches (LSP test)

mocking: Use `glyim_test::mock::TestDbBuilder` to create a database, then call LSP methods.

name: LSP Server â€“ Advanced Features
scope_summary: Implement remaining LSP stubs: `code_action`, `folding_ranges`, `format_document`, `rename`. Also implement `provide_folding_ranges` and `provide_code_actions` (quick fixes).

tests.U08-T01: Code action suggests removing unused import (LSP test)
tests.U08-T02: Folding ranges are generated for braces (LSP test)
tests.U08-T03: Format document runs `cargo fmt` and returns edits (LSP test)
